item.title: CapCut template featuring @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur dancing to Dancing In The Dark by Rihanna while performing @71cent’s trending dance, turning a smooth, emotional track into a chaotic brainrot performance. Tung Tung Tung Sahu
